type: verify implementation + verify tests + verify correctness
title: Independently recheck protocol plan-example fix

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification only. Confirm MVP-012 fixed the exact blocking MVP-011 finding and did not weaken the protocol contract.
goals: Run cargo fmt --all --check and cargo test.
Verify the exact plan examples deserialize through public AutocompleteRequest/AutocompleteResponse types, validate against generated schemas, and pass semantic Validate.
Verify regression tests exist so plan examples drifting invalid breaks cargo test.
Verify protocol_version remains required unless an explicit design change was documented and justified.
Verify no server/provider/client code was added in the fix task.
non_goals: Do not implement new source features.
Do not alter the protocol contract except for tiny test/doc corrections if absolutely necessary.
success_criteria: If verification passes, mark the protocol artifacts as trusted for downstream core/provider work.
If verification fails, include concrete file/line issues and revive MVP-012 or spawn a new fix task.
